dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION For intranasal use only ( 2.3 ) Seasonal allergic rhinitis: Pediatric patients 5 to 11 years of age: 1 spray per nostril twice daily ( 2.1 ) Adults and adolescents 12 years of age and older: 1 or 2 sprays per nostril twice daily ( 2.1 ) Vasomotor rhinitis: 2 sprays per nostril twice daily in adults and adolescents 12 years of age and older ( 2.2 ) Prime azelastine hydrochloride nasal spray before initial use and when it has not been used for 3 or more days ( 2.3 ) 2.1
